description: Outreach is a sales execution platform with AI-powered workflows for prospecting, deal management, forecasting, and coaching, built to help revenue teams close more.
overview: Outreach gives revenue teams AI-powered workflows to manage accounts, guide deals, forecast more accurately, and coach reps, bringing prospecting and pipeline into one platform.
what_is: Outreach is a sales execution platform that helps sales, revenue operations, and customer success teams build pipeline and close deals. It uses AI-driven workflows to streamline prospecting, forecasting, coaching, and deal management so teams can make more informed, data-backed decisions.

It shines when teams need to organize accounts, automate follow-ups, forecast revenue, and coach reps at scale. By cutting research time and surfacing AI-generated next steps and messaging, it helps reps respond faster and stay focused on the deals that matter.

Outreach fits into the go-to-market stack by integrating with CRM systems and adding conversation intelligence and pipeline management. It is not a basic email-marketing or standalone CRM tool; it is a workflow-first platform focused on driving revenue through AI-powered engagement and forecasting.
